title: Frontier Alpha Environment Variable Contract
description: Machine-checkable contract for every env var referenced by frontier-alpha. New env in code without an entry here makes CI fail (US-009). Audit script reads this to validate Vercel + Railway env values for whitespace, length, and regex compliance.

vars.name: SUPABASE_URL
vars.description: Supabase project URL (server-side).

vars.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
vars.description: Supabase service-role JWT (server only — never ship to client).

vars.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
vars.description: Supabase public anon JWT. Server may not always read it — VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is the client-facing copy.

vars.name: POLYGON_API_KEY
vars.description: Polygon REST + WebSocket API key. EXACTLY 32 chars — v1.2.6 incident: echo|vercel env add truncated to 30 chars and silently 401'd for weeks. Always rotate via printf, not echo.

vars.name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY
vars.description: Alpha Vantage fallback for quote / history. Free-tier 25 req/day.

vars.name: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
vars.description: DeepSeek primary cognitive explainer key.

vars.name: DEEPSEEK_MODEL
vars.description: Optional DeepSeek model override; defaults to deepseek-chat in code.

vars.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
vars.description: OpenAI fallback explainer key (GPT-4o).

vars.name: OPENAI_MODEL
vars.description: Optional OpenAI model override; defaults to gpt-4o in code.

vars.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
vars.description: Stripe secret key. MUST start with sk_ — sk_live_ for prod, sk_test_ for staging.

vars.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
vars.description: Stripe webhook signing secret. Required to verify billing events.

vars.name: STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID
vars.description: Stripe Price ID for the Pro tier. Server-side billing route reads this.

vars.name: STRIPE_ENTERPRISE_PRICE_ID
vars.description: Stripe Price ID for the Enterprise tier. Server-side billing route reads this.

vars.name: EMAIL_API_KEY
vars.description: Resend (or compatible) email API key. Resend keys begin with re_.

vars.name: EMAIL_PROVIDER
vars.description: Provider routing for transactional email. Resend in production today.

vars.name: EMAIL_FROM
vars.description: Sender email address used by Resend transactional sends. PRD US-009 also lists this as RESEND_FROM_EMAIL — code uses EMAIL_FROM.

vars.name: RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
vars.description: Alias for EMAIL_FROM listed in v1.3.0 PRD; either value is accepted by Resend integration.

vars.name: BROKER_CRED_ENC_KEY
vars.description: AES-256-GCM master key for encrypting per-user broker credentials at rest. EXACTLY 64 hex chars.

vars.name: CRON_SECRET
vars.description: Shared secret for Vercel cron + synthetic monitor + digest invocations. EXACTLY 64 hex chars.

vars.name: VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
vars.description: Web Push VAPID public key (P-256, 65-byte uncompressed → ~87 base64url chars). Pair with VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY.

vars.name: VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY
vars.description: Web Push VAPID private key (P-256 D scalar, 32 bytes → ~43 base64url chars). Pair with VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY.

vars.name: WEB_PUSH_SUBJECT
vars.description: Web Push contact (mailto: or https:) used by the VAPID subscriber field.

vars.name: BILLING_ENABLED
vars.description: Boolean flag — when 'true', Stripe checkout flows mount; when 'false' or unset, billing is paused.

vars.name: FRONTEND_URL
vars.description: Public origin used by Stripe redirects, password-reset links, and email templates. https://frontier-alpha.metaventionsai.com in prod.

vars.name: ALPACA_API_KEY
vars.description: Optional global Alpaca API key (most users connect their own via OAuth-equivalent flow).

vars.name: ALPACA_API_SECRET
vars.description: Optional global Alpaca API secret. Pairs with ALPACA_API_KEY.

vars.name: ALPACA_PAPER_TRADING
vars.description: Force paper trading for the global Alpaca client when set to 'true'.

vars.name: ML_SENTIMENT_ENDPOINT
vars.description: Optional Python ML sentiment service endpoint.

vars.name: REDIS_URL
vars.description: Optional Redis URL — currently unused in prod (Supabase-backed rate limiter is primary). Reserved for future Upstash upgrade.

vars.name: PORT
vars.description: Optional server port override. Vercel + Railway set this automatically.

vars.name: NODE_ENV
vars.description: Standard Node runtime environment selector.

vars.name: VERCEL
vars.description: Set to '1' by Vercel runtime; used to fork code paths between Vercel serverless and standalone Fastify.

vars.name: LOG_LEVEL
vars.description: Pino log level override. Defaults to info in production.

vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
vars.description: Legacy Next-prefixed copy of the app URL; some shared utilities still read it.

vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
vars.description: Legacy Next-prefixed Supabase URL retained for backward-compat shims.

vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
vars.description: Legacy Next-prefixed Supabase anon key retained for backward-compat shims.

vars.name: TEST_API_URL
vars.description: Test-only API base URL used by integration smoke tests (US-007).

vars.name: WEBHOOK_URL
vars.description: Script-only webhook registration target used by scripts/wire-stripe-webhook.mjs.

vars.name: VITE_SUPABASE_URL
vars.description: Client-side Supabase project URL injected at build time. Trim before use — \n is truthy in JS.

vars.name: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
vars.description: Client-side Supabase anon JWT injected at build time.

vars.name: VITE_API_URL
vars.description: REST API origin baked into the SPA bundle. Must NOT have trailing whitespace — feedback_vercel_env_newline.md.

vars.name: VITE_WS_URL
vars.description: WebSocket origin for live quotes (Railway-hosted in prod). Trim before use.

vars.name: VITE_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
vars.description: Client-side mirror of VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY for Web Push subscription.

vars.name: VITE_STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID
vars.description: Pro Price ID baked into the SPA for Stripe checkout.

vars.name: VITE_STRIPE_ENTERPRISE_PRICE_ID
vars.description: Enterprise Price ID baked into the SPA for Stripe checkout.

vars.name: VITE_APP_VERSION
vars.sourceUrl: internal — sourced from package.json at build time
vars.description: Optional semver string injected into the SPA for the version footer.

vars.name: VITE_SENTRY_DSN
vars.description: Optional client Sentry DSN. Audited in US-008.

vars.name: VITE_SERVER_PORT
vars.description: Optional dev-only override telling the SPA which port the local Fastify server listens on.

vars.name: VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA
vars.sourceUrl: internal — Vercel sets this automatically on deploy
vars.description: Vercel-injected build SHA. Read by US-008 health-summary for tagging error events.

vars.name: RAILWAY_DEPLOYMENT_ID
vars.sourceUrl: internal — Railway sets this automatically on deploy
vars.description: Railway-injected deployment id. Read by US-008 health-summary for cross-tier tagging.

vars.name: SENTRY_DSN
vars.description: Server-side Sentry DSN. Audited in US-008. Optional — when unset, the in-process error counter is the sole source.

vars.name: HEALTH_PROBE_BASE_URL
vars.description: Optional override telling the integrations health probe which API base URL to call instead of localhost. Used in US-004 staging diagnostics.

vars.name: VERCEL_URL
vars.description: Auto-injected by Vercel into every deployment (e.g. `frontier-alpha-abc123.vercel.app`). Used by `src/routes/health.ts` to report which Vercel deployment is responding without the operator having to look it up. Read-only, no rotation needed.

vars.name: SYNTHETIC_BASE_URL
vars.description: Optional override telling the synthetic monitor cron which base URL to probe (defaults to FRONTEND_URL). Useful for staging or PR-preview synthetic checks without changing production config.

vars.name: INTEGRATION_BASE_URL
vars.description: Test-only — `tests/integration/auth-helper.ts` uses this to point integration tests at a non-localhost API (e.g., a deployed preview). When unset, integration suite hits `http://localhost:3000`.
